title: Has Petit Eva been translated into English
display_title: Has Petit Eva been translated into English
wikitext:
[]: Has Petit Eva been translated into English?             Quote Post by ____ » Thu Sep 01, 2016 11:10 pm At this point I have read most of SIRP and Campus Apocalypse, and they were neat time wasters (maybe not so neat in TSIRP's case) but I really enjoyed the Petit Eva ONAs, and would like to check out the mangas. They don't seem very similar at all, but cutesy and inconsequential are more than enough for them to be enjoyable, though the Xebec shorts were pretty nonsensical. I'm really hoping they are in English, if anyone knows of this. I could try reading them in French but the language leaves a bad taste in my mouth.

[]: Re: Has Petit Eva been translated into English?             Quote Post by Gargantuar » Wed Sep 21, 2016 2:34 pm Qu'est-ce tu viens de dire la mec mec je suis énerver comment a tu oser dire la france te mettait un mauvais gout!Hein! Déjà les attentats en france maintenant tu as du mauvais gout dans ta bouche. Olala c'est pas possible. C'est du racisme! Et oui je le dis!JE Le dis! (jk)

Article: Has Petit Eva been translated into English
[]: Has Petit Eva been translated into English?             Quote Post by ____ » Thu Sep 01, 2016 11:10 pm At this point I have read most of SIRP and Campus Apocalypse, and they were neat time wasters (maybe not so neat in TSIRP's case) but I really enjoyed the Petit Eva ONAs, and would like to check out the mangas. They don't seem very similar at all, but cutesy and inconsequential are more than enough for them to be enjoyable, though the Xebec shorts were pretty nonsensical. I'm really hoping they are in English, if anyone knows of this. I could try reading them in French but the language leaves a bad taste in my mouth.
